message:
audit: complete 100% src/ coverage — batch 376 (46 files) + diff audit batch 378

Batch 376: all remaining 46 unaudited .rs files under src/ audited
(plan/fixtures.rs 2259L, transport/tests.rs 2115L, 10 medium files,
32 mod.rs re-exports, 2 test binaries). All SOUND, 0 bugs.

Batch 378: diff audit of 6 files with working-tree changes (~678L).
All SOUND — decoding.rs cumulative counter, grpc/health.rs monotonic
version tracking, fixtures.rs lock ordering, shutdown.rs fetch_max,
symbol.rs explicit constructors, symbol_set.rs test updates.

Total: 793 audit_index entries covering every src/ .rs file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
